# Dashboard Specification

## Pre-publish dashboard

Show:

```text
Viral Potential Score
Confidence level
Subscores
Top 3 strengths
Top 3 weaknesses
Recommended edits
Variant comparison
Publish / revise / discard recommendation
```

## Live dashboard

Show:

```text
Live Breakout Score
Wave 1/2/3 probabilities
Expected 24h / 72h / 7d reach
Velocity and acceleration
Observed metric lift
Stall reason
Suggested next action
```

## Example pre-publish screen

```text
Draft_042.mp4

VPS-P: 81 / 100
Confidence: Medium

Strong:
- Hook score high
- Topic fit high
- TRIBE hook response strong
- Shareability above baseline

Weak:
- Retention decay predicted after 7s
- Saturation penalty medium
- Payoff too late

Action:
Move payoff from 13s to 7s.
Cut 1.8s of setup.
Add clearer first-frame text.
Retest variant B.
```

## Example live screen

```text
Video_092

Live Breakout Score, 30m: 86 / 100

Observed stop lift:        +22%
Observed retention lift:   +18%
Observed share/save lift:  +44%
Negative feedback:         below baseline
Velocity:                  accelerating

Prediction:
Likely Wave 2 expansion.
```
